practical.title: What this means for you
practical.intro: Every week, new AI features and tools are released. It's overwhelming...
practical.description: We build a structured setup around the AI tools your team already uses, so they become more useful, more consistent, and much easier to rely on in daily work. It's fast, lightweight, and improves over time.
practical.followup: Most companies don’t need another tool. They need a better setup around the tools they already have.

bottleneck.title: Real-life examples of what the setup can do
bottleneck.examplesLabel: Real-life examples of what the setup can do:

useCases.title: Enrich prospects
useCases.description: The agent checks your CRM, searches Google Maps, cross-references your ideal customer profile, and adds new prospects to HubSpot.
useCases.why: Claude on the web can search too, but can't access your CRM or know your ideal customer.

useCases.title: Build a Google Slides deck
useCases.description: Create full Google Slides decks from your terminal or Claude Desktop. ZPT sets up the Google Workspace CLI so the agent builds branded decks on command.
useCases.why: Same tools, but with your company's positioning, tone, and formatting built in.

useCases.title: Monitor competitors
useCases.description: The agent pulls from LinkedIn, Google Maps, and other sources to track competitor activity on a regular schedule. Results go into a shared file your team can review.
useCases.why: No more ad hoc research scattered across team members' chat histories.

useCases.title: Automate busywork
useCases.description: Copy meeting notes between CRM systems. Update spreadsheets from email data. Define it once, repeat indefinitely.
useCases.why: Workflows that run on their own, not tasks someone remembers to do manually.

bottleneck.screenshotLabel: Screenshot from Claude Desktop, pointing at a ZPT folder
bottleneck.screenshotCaption: Real example: Claude finds new prospects in Chicago by checking HubSpot, cross-referencing the ICP, and searching Google Maps.

growing.title: A setup that grows with you
growing.arrow: Add MCPs, skills, and agents over time
growing.caption: Each addition gives the agent one more capability. You control what gets added.

quote.text: Every major technology shift creates a massive change management challenge for enterprises.

steps.title: Collect company context

steps.title: Connect to your CRM

onboarding.callout: You get the output. We run the system.

items.text: Companies with sales data but inconsistent or manual enrichment
Teams working from spreadsheets or a CRM that needs cleanup
Traditional firms that want more pipeline without hiring immediately
Lean teams that need better output from their existing sales process

items.question: How long does it take to get started?
items.answer: Most companies are up and running within 15 minutes. ZPT needs context about the business, the ideal customer profile, and the tools in use. From there, the first enriched prospect profile is generated immediately.

items.question: What tools does ZPT connect to?
items.answer: ZPT integrates with HubSpot, Salesforce, Google Drive, Notion, and Slack. It pulls from and pushes to the tools the company already uses. No migration, no new software.

items.question: How is this different from hiring an SDR?
items.answer: ZPT handles the repetitive parts of the sales process: sourcing, enrichment, outreach drafting, and pipeline management. It runs 24/7 at a fraction of the cost. Human oversight stays in the loop for approvals and relationship building.

items.question: Who approves the outreach before it goes out?
items.answer: The company always approves. ZPT drafts personalized outreach based on prospect research, but nothing gets sent without explicit approval. Full control stays with the team.

items.question: Can ZPT work with our existing CRM data?
items.answer: Yes. ZPT connects to the company's existing CRM and syncs data bidirectionally. Existing contacts, deals, and pipeline stages are preserved and enriched.

items.question: What happens to our data?
items.answer: Your company data and output stay under your control. ZPT operates the sales system on your behalf and pushes the results back into the tools your team already uses.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: A fraction of what a single SDR costs.

hero.title: Your company knows AI is powerful.
hero.subtitle: We make it happen.
hero.description: ZPT builds a practical AI setup tailored to your company. Your team uses it through Claude, ChatGPT, or any compatible app. You own everything.

tools.title: Connects to your stack
tools.subtitle: ZPT plugs into the tools your company already uses. No migration, no new software.

items.title: Build presentations from scratch
items.description: Have Claude create an entire Google Slides deck based on your company materials, style, and previous client work.

items.title: Pull from multiple tools
items.description: Find the right meeting notes, summarize them, and add the outcome to Notion or another system your team already uses.

items.title: Standardize repetitive workflows
items.description: Turn recurring manual work into a repeatable workflow your team can actually use without re-explaining everything each time.

items.title: Create better outputs
items.description: Generate summaries, drafts, reports, and updates in a format that matches how your company already works.

items.title: Connect context across tools
items.description: Use information from notes, documents, spreadsheets, and internal knowledge in one place instead of scattered chat histories.

items.title: Onboard team members faster
items.description: Give new hires access to the same company knowledge, templates, and workflows from day one. No shadowing or tribal knowledge required.

nativeTools.title: But aren't Claude and ChatGPT already adding these features?
paragraphs: Yes, and that's exactly why this works. Tools like Claude and ChatGPT ship powerful default capabilities: skills, integrations, memory. But they're generic. Every company gets the same starting point.

ZPT takes those same building blocks and structures them around your company. Your context, your workflows, your standards. The result: your team gets more out of the tools they're already using, because the tools actually know how the company works.

items.title: 100% company-owned
items.description: The entire system runs on a local folder on your machine. No data leaves your network. No vendor lock-in. The most private AI setup possible.

items.title: Open-source compatible
items.description: Concerned about sharing data with AI labs? Run the system on open-source models (Llama, Mistral, etc.). Same folder, same workflow, full control.

items.title: Built on Claude Code architecture
items.description: The same local folder system used by developers worldwide (CLAUDE.md, skills/, memory/), but purpose-built for business operations instead of code.

items.title: Plugs into what you already use
items.description: Claude in your spreadsheets. Claude in your presentations. Connect to Excel, PowerPoint, Google Drive, Slack, HubSpot, and more. No migration required.

concept.title: Every company is different
paragraphs: ZPT captures culture, roles, processes, and institutional knowledge into a practical shared setup. The agent reads this before every task, working like a colleague who's been at the company for years.
The setup stays fully local. No vendor lock-in. Works with Anthropic, OpenAI, open-source models, and others. Switch providers anytime.

agentVisual.caption: The AI provider is interchangeable. Your company setup stays local and proprietary to the company.

desktop.title: Your team works with the agent directly
desktop.subtitle: ZPT sets up the desktop apps so your team can collaborate with the AI agent from day one.

cards.description: Ask questions, give feedback, review output.

cards.name: Codex Desktop
cards.description: Run tasks, review output, collaborate on workflows.

desktop.note: We help your team get set up and running. No technical knowledge required.

folder.title: The ZPT folder structure
folder.description: Below is an example of a default ZPT structure. Every setup is customized, but this shows the foundation.
folder.note: The structure above is an example. Every deployment is customized to match the company's actual workflow, tools, and processes.

folders.name: company-context/
folders.label: Context
folders.description: What the business is: overview, product, ICP, positioning

folders.name: account-management/
folders.label: CRM
folders.description: Prospect data and profiles, organized by pipeline stage

folders.name: skills/
folders.label: Standards
folders.description: How output should look: templates, formats, quality rules

folders.name: memory/
folders.label: Memory
folders.description: Lessons learned, preferences, patterns discovered over time

folders.name: output/
folders.label: Deliverables
folders.description: Drafts, content, reports ready for review

folders.name: workflows/
folders.label: Processes
folders.description: How tasks get done: step-by-step procedures

folders.name: CLAUDE.md
folders.label: Instructions
folders.description: Operating instructions for the AI agents

consulting.title: The ZPT SWAT team drops in
consulting.description: We deploy into your org, set up a tailored ZPT folder, connect it to your existing tools, train the team, and provide ongoing support.
points: Custom folder structure tailored to the company's workflow
Agent configured with full company context (culture, roles, processes)
Connected to existing tools — Excel, PowerPoint, CRM, drives, messaging
Team trained to work with the agent as a coworker
consulting.callout: You own the folder. ZPT helps you operationalize it.

pricing.title: Advisory tiers
pricing.subtitle: Pricing on request. Every engagement starts with understanding the company's needs.

cta.title: Ready to see what AI can do for your company?

about.title: About ZPT
paragraphs: ZPT believes that the most effective way to use AI agents is by running them on top of a local, structured folder system. Files the company owns, context the company controls, output the company can see and verify.
The approach: connect AI agents to the tools a company already uses, keep data local, and maintain full control over every step of the process.
Today, ZPT operates across three industries: financial analytics, automotive leasing, and logistics. Same system, different context. The product is live and operational.
